ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racial_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial or ethnic group */,
  "racial_group" TEXT /* Name of the racial or ethnic group (e.g., White, Black or African American) */,
  "percentage_2010" TEXT /* Percentage of the racial or ethnic group in the population in 2010 */,
  "percentage_1990" TEXT /* Percentage of the racial or ethnic group in the population in 1990 */,
  "percentage_1970" TEXT /* Percentage of the racial or ethnic group in the population in 1970 */,
  "percentage_1950" TEXT /* Percentage of the racial or ethnic group in the population in 1950 */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the racial or ethnic group in the specified census year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the census */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the census year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial or ethnic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial or ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial or ethnic group */,
  "sub_groups" TEXT /* Sub-groups within the main racial or ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial or ethnic group */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the racial or ethnic group in the specified census year */,
  "percentage_of_total" TEXT /* Percentage of the total population that the racial group represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES racial_composition ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "composition_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in racial or ethnic composition */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial or ethnic group */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census year */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in the racial or ethnic group between the specified census year and the previous census year */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_composition_changes_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_composition_changes_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES racial_composition ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census data point */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census year */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the data was collected */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the specified geographic area in the specified census year */,
  "geographic_area_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic area */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the geographic area */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the geographic area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial or ethnic group being analyzed */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census year being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES racial_composition ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial or ethnic group in the report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census year in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES racial_composition ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial or ethnic group for which the user has permission */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census year for which the user has permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "expires_on" TEXT /* Expiration date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES racial_composition ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("year_id")
)
